description: Schematic of the two NAD+ completion topologies: deamidated arm (NaMN→deamido-NAD→NAD+ via NadD+NadE) vs amidated arm (NAMPT→NMN→NAD+ via NMNAT), highlighting the amide-timing constraint
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
from matplotlib.patches import FancyArrowPatch, FancyBboxPatch

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(13, 8.5))
ax.set_xlim(0, 13); ax.set_ylim(0, 9); ax.axis('off')

def box(x, y, w, h, text, fc, ec='black', fs=9, tc='black'):
    b = FancyBboxPatch((x, y), w, h, boxstyle="round,pad=0.03,rounding_size=0.08",
                       linewidth=1.3, facecolor=fc, edgecolor=ec)
    ax.add_patch(b)
    ax.text(x+w/2, y+h/2, text, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=fs, color=tc, wrap=True)

def arrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color='black', lw=1.6, style='-|>'):
    ax.add_patch(FancyArrowPatch((x1, y1), (x2, y2), arrowstyle=style,
                 mutation_scale=14, linewidth=lw, color=color))

# Colors
c_denovo = '#cfe8ff'  # de novo
c_salv   = '#ffe0b3'  # deamidated salvage
c_node   = '#d5f5d5'  # NaMN node
c_compl  = '#e8d5f5'  # completion
c_amid   = '#ffd6d6'  # amidated arm
c_prod   = '#fff2a8'  # NAD product

# Title
ax.text(6.5, 8.6, "L-aspartate de novo & selected salvage routes to NAD$^+$",
        ha='center', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax.text(6.5, 8.2, "Central constraint: WHEN the amide nitrogen is installed defines the completion topology",
        ha='center', fontsize=9.5, style='italic', color='#444')

# --- DE NOVO arm (top left) ---
box(0.3, 6.6, 2.1, 0.7, "L-aspartate", c_denovo)
box(0.3, 5.5, 2.1, 0.7, "iminoaspartate", c_denovo)
box(0.3, 4.4, 2.1, 0.7, "quinolinate", c_denovo)
arrow(1.35, 6.6, 1.35, 6.22); ax.text(1.5, 6.4, "NadB\n(L-Asp oxidase, FAD)", ha='left', va='center', fontsize=7.3)
arrow(1.35, 5.5, 1.35, 5.12); ax.text(1.5, 5.3, "NadA\n([4Fe-4S], O$_2$-sensitive)", ha='left', va='center', fontsize=7.3)
arrow(1.35, 4.4, 1.35, 4.02); ax.text(1.5, 4.2, "NadC (+PRPP, -CO$_2$)", ha='left', va='center', fontsize=7.3)

# --- Deamidated salvage feeders (mid left) ---
box(0.3, 2.9, 1.55, 0.6, "nicotinamide", c_salv, fs=8)
box(2.15, 2.9, 1.35, 0.6, "nicotinate", c_salv, fs=8)
box(0.3, 1.7, 1.55, 0.6, "NMN\n(from NAD turnover)", c_salv, fs=7)
arrow(1.07, 2.9, 2.15, 3.2); ax.text(1.1, 3.45, "PncA", ha='left', fontsize=7.3)
# nicotinate -> NaMN via PncB
# NMN -> NaMN via PncC

# --- NaMN node ---
box(3.9, 3.3, 1.9, 0.9, "NaMN\n(deamidated\nbranch point)", c_node, fs=9, ec='#2a7a2a')
# de novo -> NaMN
arrow(2.4, 4.7, 3.9, 4.0)  # quinolinate to NaMN
ax.text(2.55, 4.55, "", fontsize=7)
# nicotinate PncB -> NaMN
arrow(2.82, 3.5, 3.9, 3.6); ax.text(3.0, 3.75, "PncB\n(+PRPP,ATP)", ha='left', fontsize=6.8)
# NMN PncC -> NaMN
arrow(1.85, 2.0, 3.9, 3.35); ax.text(2.4, 2.35, "PncC\n(NMN deamidase)", ha='left', fontsize=6.8)

# --- Deamidated completion ---
box(6.4, 3.3, 2.0, 0.9, "deamido-NAD\n(NaAD)", c_compl, fs=9)
arrow(5.8, 3.75, 6.4, 3.75); ax.text(5.75, 4.05, "NadD / NMNAT\n(adenylylation, +ATP)", ha='center', fontsize=6.9)
box(9.9, 3.3, 2.4, 0.9, "NAD$^+$", c_prod, fs=13, ec='#b38f00')
arrow(8.4, 3.75, 9.9, 3.75); ax.text(9.15, 4.15, "NAD synthetase (NadE/NADSYN)", ha='center', fontsize=6.9)
ax.text(9.15, 3.9, "amidation: NH$_3$  or  Gln", ha='center', fontsize=6.6, color='#663399')

# --- Amidated arm (bottom) ---
box(0.3, 0.4, 1.55, 0.6, "nicotinamide", c_amid, fs=8)
box(3.9, 0.4, 1.9, 0.6, "NMN\n(amidated)", c_amid, fs=8)
arrow(1.85, 0.7, 3.9, 0.7); ax.text(2.85, 0.9, "NAMPT (+PRPP)  [rate-limiting, mammals]", ha='center', fontsize=6.9)
arrow(5.8, 0.7, 10.6, 0.7, color='#b30000', lw=2.0)
ax.text(8.2, 0.95, "NMNAT  —  DIRECT adenylylation, NO NAD synthetase step", ha='center', fontsize=7.6, color='#b30000', fontweight='bold')
arrow(11.1, 1.0, 11.1, 3.3, color='#b30000', lw=2.0)

# connect nicotinamide(amid) up to nicotinamide(salv) conceptually - same pool
ax.text(0.32, 1.15, "same free-base pool ↕", fontsize=6.5, color='#888')

# Legend
handles = [
    mpatches.Patch(color=c_denovo, label='L-aspartate de novo (NadB/NadA/NadC)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color=c_salv, label='Deamidated salvage feeders (PncA/PncB/PncC)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color=c_node, label='NaMN branch point'),
    mpatches.Patch(color=c_compl, label='Shared deamido-NAD completion'),
    mpatches.Patch(color=c_amid, label='Amidated arm (NAMPT→NMN)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color=c_prod, label='NAD$^+$ product'),
]
ax.legend(handles=handles, loc='upper right', fontsize=7.6, framealpha=0.95, ncol=1, bbox_to_anchor=(1.0, 0.99))

# annotation boxes for the two topologies
ax.text(6.5, 2.55, "LATE amidation (two-step completion: NadD then NadE)", ha='center', fontsize=8, color='#663399', fontweight='bold')
ax.text(8.2, 0.15, "EARLY amidation (one-step completion: NMNAT only)", ha='center', fontsize=8, color='#b30000', fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('nad_route_architecture.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
print("Figure saved: nad_route_architecture.png")
